name: prefs
description: User language preferences — 3 axes (code authoring · doc authoring · response language to user). UserPromptSubmit + SessionStart + PreCompact + PostCompact hook auto-injects current values as additionalContext; UserPromptSubmit re-injects every turn so the preference never fades from context. /prefs show · /prefs code <lang> · /prefs docs <lang> · /prefs response <lang>. Storage at $CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA/prefs.json. Defaults: code=english, docs=english, response=korean. SSOT for language preferences.
